fucina.interpretation: one non-empty SSE content event per reported completion token

vllm.concurrency_request_event_counts: 127 or 128 SSE content events for 128 reported completion tokens
vllm.interpretation: vLLM may coalesce two tokens into one streamed content chunk; raw client intervals are SSE-chunk intervals, not guaranteed token-exact ITL
vllm.disposition: aggregate completion throughput, usage counts, TTFT, wall time, failures and server Prometheus counters are valid; vLLM per-token ITL is MISSING and chunk-interval percentiles are diagnostic only

output_length.reason: keep decode active when the arriving long prefill starts 50 ms later
output_length.disposition: explicit mixed-workload protocol deviation; all concurrency, long, context, burst, prefix and arriving-prefill requests use 128
